bird.name: Bismarck hanging parrot
bird.summary: The Bismarck hanging parrot or green-fronted hanging parrot (Loriculus tener) is a small species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It…

locations.name: 約克公爵群島
locations.summary: 約克公爵群島（Duke of York Islands）是巴布亞新畿內亞東新不列顛省的島嶼，位於新不列顛島和新愛爾蘭島之間的太平洋海域，屬於俾斯麥群島的一部分，由13座島嶼組成，總面積58平方公里。最大的島為約克公爵島。

locations.name: 新漢諾威島
locations.summary: 新漢諾威島是巴布亞新幾內亞的火山島，位於新愛爾蘭省，屬於俾斯麥群島的一部分，島嶼長60公里、闊30公里，面積1,186平方公里，島上最高點海拔900米，2000年人口17,160。

locations.name: Manne Island
locations.summary: Manne Island is an island of Papua New Guinea, located of the north-west coast of New Ireland.

locations.name: Selapiu Island
locations.summary: Selapiu Island is an island of Papua New Guinea, located immediately south of the corner of New Hanover Island.

locations.name: Tsoilaunung Island
locations.summary: Tsoilaunung Island is an island of Papua New Guinea, located to the east of New Hanover Island, to the north of New Ire…

locations.name: Patio Island
locations.summary: Patio Island is a small island of Papua New Guinea, located to the southeast of New Hanover Island, to the north-west o…

locations.name: 雨林
locations.summary: 雨林是雨量甚多的生物區系。雨林依位置的不同分热带雨林和溫帶雨林。雨林大多数靠近赤道，在赤道经过的非洲、亚洲和南美洲都有大片的雨林。湿润的气候保证了树和植物的快速生产。同时，树和植物也为雨林中的成千上万种生物提供了食物和庇护所。雨林曾經覆蓋…

relations.subject: Bismarck hanging parrot
relations.evidence: It can also be found throughout the Duke of York Islands, New Hanover Island, Manne Island, Selapiu Island, Tsoilaunung Island, Patio Island, and other surrounding smaller islands. It is found in lowland rainforest at altitudes of up to 500 meters, but prefers to live in areas less than 200 meters in elevation

relations.subject: Bismarck hanging parrot
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Bismarck hanging parrot
relations.evidence: Like many other birds in the Bismarck Archipelago, the Bismarck hanging parrot is threatened by deforestation, encroaching human settlement, mining operations, and illegal logging. It was classified as Near threatened by the IUCN from 2004-2018, but was downgraded to Least concern in 2021
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
